policyRateNote: Held in May after five consecutive cuts. Next MPC meeting 22 Jul 2026.
inflationNote: Up from 3.7% in May — third consecutive monthly rise, released 01 Jul 2026.
marketCapNote: Ghana Stock Exchange total market capitalization.
outlookNote: Consensus still expects 100-200bps of cuts in 2026, but timing has pushed back on geopolitical inflation risk.
briefing: The Bank of Ghana's next rate decision (22 Jul) is the dominant driver to watch. A held policy rate is generally supportive for bank net interest margins but keeps T-bills more competitive with equities. Update this file by hand once a month, or whenever a new inflation print or MPC decision lands — these figures move too slowly to script.
